query:
INSERT INTO `investment_protection_safeguards` 
(`safeguardType`, `name`, `description`, `isConstitutional`, `enforcementLevel`, `appliesTo`, `thresholdPercentage`) VALUES
('firewall', '60% House Firewall', 'The 60% House Retained portion is completely protected and inaccessible to any investor. All investments are limited to the 40% Network Pool only.', TRUE, 'automatic', 'all_investments', NULL),
('veto_right', 'Founding House Chair Veto', 'The Founding House Chair retains absolute veto power over all investment decisions. No investment can proceed without Chair approval.', TRUE, 'automatic', 'all_investments', NULL),
('cap_limit', 'Maximum Investor Allocation', 'Maximum 25% of the 40% Network Pool (10% of total enterprise) can be allocated to outside investors. Remaining 75% of pool stays internal.', TRUE, 'automatic', 'all_investments', 25.00),
('buyback', 'Mandatory Buyback Rights', 'The enterprise retains the right to repurchase any investor stake at predetermined terms. Buyback can be exercised at any time after minimum holding period.', FALSE, 'requires_approval', 'equity_only', NULL),
('sunset', 'Investment Term Limits', 'All investment agreements must include sunset clauses preventing permanent dilution. Maximum term is 10 years with renewal requiring new approval.', FALSE, 'requires_approval', 'all_investments', NULL),
('approval_required', 'Board Approval Threshold', 'Any investment exceeding 5% of Network Pool requires Decision Board approval with 2/3 majority vote.', FALSE, 'requires_approval', 'all_investments', 5.00);
